commandments.title: First Commandment
commandments.text: You shall have no other gods.

seeds.instruction: God is to be our highest good and refuge.
seeds.thanksgiving: being my Father who never casts me away.
seeds.confession: trust in money or reputation more than Your promise.
seeds.petition: give me a heart that clings to You alone.

commandments.title: Second Commandment
commandments.text: You shall not misuse the name of the Lord your God.

seeds.instruction: His Name is a holy treasure for prayer and praise.
seeds.thanksgiving: revealing Your Name and inviting me to call on You.
seeds.confession: have used Your name carelessly or remained silent when I should have confessed.
seeds.petition: help me use Your name rightly today: to pray, praise, and give thanks.

commandments.title: Third Commandment
commandments.text: Remember the Sabbath day by keeping it holy.

seeds.instruction: to keep the day holy is to hold Your Word sacred and gladly learn it.
seeds.thanksgiving: the rest You provide for my soul in Christ.
seeds.confession: prioritize my own entertainment over Your Word.
seeds.petition: create in me a hunger for Your Word.

commandments.title: Fourth Commandment
commandments.text: Honor your father and your mother.

seeds.instruction: God places authorities over us to protect and provide for us.
seeds.thanksgiving: those You have used to care for me and keep order.
seeds.confession: have rebelled and harbored secret anger against those in authority.
seeds.petition: help me to serve and obey them gladly as unto You.

seeds.instruction: this protects our neighbor’s body; we are called to help them in every need.
seeds.thanksgiving: the gift of life and for protecting me from harm.
seeds.confession: harbor hidden bitterness and have spoken harsh words.
seeds.petition: give me a heart of mercy to be a helper to my neighbor.

seeds.instruction: God honors marriage and calls us to live a chaste and decent life.
seeds.thanksgiving: the gift of marriage and the purity won in Christ.
seeds.confession: have entertained impure thoughts and failed to honor Your boundaries.
seeds.petition: grant me a pure heart and self-control.

seeds.instruction: God protects property and calls us to help others improve their possessions.
seeds.thanksgiving: providing all I need through the labor of others.
seeds.petition: help me be content and generous toward those in need.

commandments.title: Eighth Commandment
commandments.text: You shall not give false testimony.

seeds.instruction: we are to defend our neighbor, speak well of him, and explain things kindly.
seeds.thanksgiving: my reputation and for friends who defend me.
seeds.confession: have gossiped and delighted in hearing bad news.
seeds.petition: tame my tongue to speak only what is best for others.

seeds.instruction: God looks at the heart’s desire; He wants us to be content with our own.
seeds.thanksgiving: the house and home You have given me.
seeds.confession: have a heart that restlessly itches for what belongs to others.
seeds.petition: grant me true contentment in Your grace.

lords_prayer.title: Introduction
lords_prayer.text: Our Father who art in heaven.

seeds.instruction: God tenderly invites us to believe He is our true Father.
seeds.thanksgiving: adopting me into Your family through Baptism.
seeds.confession: often pray with doubt, forgetting Your love.
seeds.petition: help me to ask with all boldness and confidence.

seeds.instruction: God’s name is holy, but we pray it is kept holy among us.
seeds.thanksgiving: the pure teaching of Your Word.
seeds.confession: have not always reflected the holiness of Your Name in my life.
seeds.petition: help us live according to Your Word and preserve us from error.

seeds.instruction: His kingdom comes when the Father gives us His Holy Spirit.
seeds.thanksgiving: bringing me out of darkness into the kingdom of Your Son.
seeds.confession: live as if I were the king of my own little world.
seeds.petition: let Your Spirit rule my heart and let the Gospel spread.

seeds.instruction: God’s will is done when He breaks every evil plan against us.
seeds.thanksgiving: Your gracious will which brings life out of my failures.
seeds.confession: fight against Your will when it crosses my comfort.
seeds.petition: break and hinder every plan that stops Your Word.

lords_prayer.title: Fourth Petition
lords_prayer.text: Give us this day our daily bread.

seeds.instruction: daily bread includes everything needed for the support of the body.
seeds.thanksgiving: food, clothing, home, and the peace of our nation.
seeds.confession: am anxious about tomorrow and struggle with greed.
seeds.petition: help us receive our daily bread with true thanksgiving.

seeds.instruction: we pray the Father would not look at our sins but grant what we ask.
seeds.thanksgiving: the cross, where every one of my debts was paid.
seeds.confession: hold grudges and refuse to forgive others.
seeds.petition: graciously forgive us and help us heartily forgive others.

seeds.instruction: we ask God to guard us from the devil, the world, and our nature.
seeds.thanksgiving: the armor of Your Word that protects my soul.
seeds.confession: walk into temptation thinking I am strong.
seeds.petition: keep us from falling into despair and grant us the final victory.

seeds.instruction: we pray for rescue from every evil of body, soul, and reputation.
seeds.thanksgiving: being my fortress and shield in a dangerous world.
seeds.petition: rescue us and, at last, take us from this valley of sorrows to heaven.

seeds.instruction: Amen means: "Yes, yes, it shall be so."
seeds.thanksgiving: the certainty that You are able to do more than we ask.
seeds.confession: confess that my "Amen" is often weak and full of doubt.
seeds.petition: seal these prayers with Your truth and let me live in Your glory.
